---
name: Bug report
about: Report a problem with a skill, agent, command, or platform output
title: '[BUG] '
labels: bug
assignees: ''

---

## What type of bug?

- [ ] Skill content error (wrong advice, outdated API, typo)
- [ ] Build/validation failure
- [ ] Installation issue
- [ ] MCP server issue
- [ ] Platform-specific output problem
- [ ] Other

## Describe the bug

A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## To Reproduce

Steps to reproduce the behavior:
1. Go to '...'
2. Run command '...'
3. See error

## Expected behavior

A clear and concise description of what you expected to happen.

## Screenshots / Logs

If applicable, add screenshots or log output to help explain your problem.

## Environment

- Platform: [e.g. Claude Code, Cursor, Kimi Code]
- Version: [e.g. 0.1.0]
- OS: [e.g. macOS 15.4]

## Additional context

Add any other context about the problem here.
